# Fixtures

Place reusable manifest, catalog, deck, and composition fixtures here for schema, extraction, and end-to-end compose tests.

## Composition fixtures

- `composition/acme-architecture-onboarding/requirements.json` — example customer onboarding requirements for the compose CLI
- `composition/acme-architecture-onboarding/expected-output.json` — expected slide selection, dependency closure, and provenance for the generated deck
